text.message: I feel like red was the rob not me
would u do the one or no
Red, watch out for sheep trades
Bro blue has 3 devs and you rob me
Why would you get me instead of red
hes at seven with road ur at 5 with two devs and two cities
Yeah blue is about to win
Red, why not on the other side?
You would get an oppen setle
like ive gotten hit every time and ur still shifting blame
and ppl are already hitting me
Well you’re not the concern now
no reason to tunnel vision on me
Na I have rb, vp and yop
could have traded u road thats unfortunate
